raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.2":"The artifact asserts formal mathematical properties—closed-form solution, O(n log m) time, O(log T/T) regret, variance bounded by 4m/T—whose internal consistency is squarely within scope of any substantive improvement pass; a logical error here would invalidate the core contribution claim.","R1.3":"Concrete empirical figures (Spearman ρ = 0.74/0.71/0.69, 6–9 pp gain over uniform averaging, 2–4 pp over Adam) must cohere with the stated theoretical guarantees; misalignment between claimed optimality and reported numbers would undermine the paper's central argument.","R1.6":"'Improve this draft' centrally implies prose quality—sentence clarity, paragraph cohesion, precision of technical language, and overall readability—making writing polish a central expected responsibility regardless of scope."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should the improvement be limited to prose quality and flow, or should it also include a technical audit of the mathematical claims, complexity bounds, and evidence-claim alignment?"}

rationale.R1.2: The artifact asserts formal mathematical properties—closed-form solution, O(n log m) time, O(log T/T) regret, variance bounded by 4m/T—whose internal consistency is squarely within scope of any substantive improvement pass; a logical error here would invalidate the core contribution claim.
rationale.R1.3: Concrete empirical figures (Spearman ρ = 0.74/0.71/0.69, 6–9 pp gain over uniform averaging, 2–4 pp over Adam) must cohere with the stated theoretical guarantees; misalignment between claimed optimality and reported numbers would undermine the paper's central argument.
rationale.R1.6: 'Improve this draft' centrally implies prose quality—sentence clarity, paragraph cohesion, precision of technical language, and overall readability—making writing polish a central expected responsibility regardless of scope.

parsed.clarification_question: Should the improvement be limited to prose quality and flow, or should it also include a technical audit of the mathematical claims, complexity bounds, and evidence-claim alignment?
